channel.title: InYourBones — Bay Area Radar (far_out)
channel.description: Curated upcoming Bay Area shows from InYourBones.

item.title: Three Days Grace @ SAP Center at San Jose
item.description: 2026-11-19 03:00 — Three Days Grace at SAP Center at San Jose. Three Days Grace is known for their high-energy performances and strong fan base, making their Alienation Tour a must-see.

item.title: RUSH @ SAP Center at San Jose
item.description: 2026-10-16 02:30 → 2026-10-18 02:30 — RUSH at SAP Center at San Jose.

item.title: Rainbow Kitten Surprise @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-07-19 03:00 — Rainbow Kitten Surprise at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Rainbow Kitten Surprise is celebrated for their dynamic live shows and eclectic sound, making their bones North American Tour highly anticipated.

item.title: Tedeschi Trucks Band @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-08-13 01:00 — Tedeschi Trucks Band at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Tedeschi Trucks Band is renowned for their exceptional musicianship and soulful performances, making this show a standout.

item.title: Tori Amos @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-08-30 03:00 — Tori Amos at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Tori Amos's In Times of Dragons Tour is likely to attract a dedicated audience eager for her emotive storytelling and unique sound.

item.title: Jack Johnson @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-10-01 01:30 → 2026-10-02 01:30 — Jack Johnson at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Jack Johnson's SURFILMUSIC Tour is expected to deliver a laid-back, feel-good vibe, appealing to a wide audience.

item.title: Lionel Richie @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-08-07 02:30 — Lionel Richie at Chase Center. Lionel Richie and Earth, Wind & Fire promise a nostalgic evening filled with classic hits, appealing to fans of legacy acts.

item.title: Train @ Shoreline Amphitheatre
item.description: 2026-08-27 01:45 — Train at Shoreline Amphitheatre. Train's 25 Years in the Atmosphere tour celebrates their legacy, likely attracting long-time fans.

item.title: The Neighbourhood @ Bill Graham Civic Auditorium
item.description: 2026-10-08 02:00 — The Neighbourhood at Bill Graham Civic Auditorium. The Neighbourhood's THE WOURLD TOUR is set to showcase their evolving sound and strong live presence.

item.title: Cristian Castro @ San Jose Civic
item.description: 2026-09-27 03:00 — Cristian Castro at San Jose Civic. Childish Gambino's New World Tour is highly anticipated due to his innovative music and captivating performances.

item.title: Bob Moses @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-07-18 02:30 — Bob Moses at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Young the Giant's collaboration with Cold War Kids on their Victory Garden Tour promises a night of diverse sounds.

item.title: Hilary Duff @ Shoreline Amphitheatre
item.description: 2026-07-12 02:00 — Hilary Duff at Shoreline Amphitheatre. Hilary Duff's Lucky Me Tour is a nostalgic draw for fans of early 2000s pop music.

item.title: O.A.R. @ The Masonic
item.description: 2026-08-13 01:30 — O.A.R. at The Masonic. O.A.R. has a dedicated fan base and their Three Decades Tour will likely resonate with long-time followers.

item.title: J. Cole @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-08-30 03:00 — J. Cole at Oakland Arena. J. Cole's The Fall-Off Tour is expected to draw significant attention due to his strong reputation and lyrical prowess.

item.title: Micky Dolenz @ Uptown Theatre Napa
item.description: 2026-07-20 03:00 — Micky Dolenz at Uptown Theatre Napa. Micky Dolenz's 60 Years of The Monkees offers a nostalgic trip for fans of classic pop music.
